name.description: A human-readable name for the Resource.

description.description: An optional description of the Resource.
description.example: Primary workspace for the Acme team

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization that owns the resource.

parent_resource_id.description: The ID of the parent resource, if this resource is nested.

id.description: The unique ID of the Resource.

external_id.description: An identifier you provide to reference the resource in your system.

resource_type_slug.description: The slug of the resource type this resource belongs to.

code.description: The error code identifying the type of error.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
